feed.title: Sammy Tribble’s Portfolio | Hello, world!
feed.subtitle: I am an aerospace robotics student at Harvey Mudd College passionate about autonomous navigation and space exploration. I enjoy designing rover test beds and experiments that evaluate autonomous navigation tasks, like identifying sources of localization error or performing image segmentation. I'm researching Mars-Analog environments and I'm designing a high-fidelity simulation tool for Mars rovers with the Unreal Engine, which addresses the sim-to-real gap: the ability of modern simulation tools to emulate realism between robotics sensor inputs and feedback.
